message:
test(wave-46): add 11 pure data-type tests for dns/{error,cache}, grpc/service, lab/fuzz

First-ever tests for net/dns/error.rs. Cover DnsError, CacheConfig,
CacheStats, DnsCache, MethodDescriptor, ServiceDescriptor, FuzzConfig,
FuzzFinding, and FuzzReport derive traits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
